revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:不動王生霊返し]]
{{Citation needed|date=December 2013}} '''Fudō-Ō Ikiryō-Gaeshi''' (不動王生霊返し) is a spell reversal technique from the {{ill|Izanagi school|ja|いざなぎ流|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izanagi school|qq=}} tradition of {{ill|Onmyōdō|en|Onmyōdō|qid=Q1340540|lt=Onmyōdō|1=Onmyōdō}} in Tosa Province.
== Overview == Among the surviving spell reversal practices, Fudō-Ō Ikiryō-Gaeshi is one of the most famous. It involves invoking {{ill|Acala|en|Acala|qid=Q337624|lt=Fudō Myōō|1=Acala}} as a protective prayer to counteract curses and bindings. The practice incorporates the Five-Syllable Mantra of {{ill|Vairocana|en|Vairocana|qid=Q239847|lt=Dainichi Nyorai|1=Vairocana}} ("Om A Vi Ra Un Ken Sowa-ka").
== Full Text == '''Prayer to Fudō Myōō:''' Moe-en Fudō Myōō (不動明王), Kaen Fudō-Ō (火炎不動王), Namikiri Fudō-Ō (波切不動王), Ōyama Fudō-Ō (大山不動王), Kongara Fudō-Ō (吟伽羅不動王), Kichijōmyō Fudō-Ō (吉祥妙不動王), Tenjiku Fudō-Ō (天竺不動王), Tenjiku Sakayama Fudō-Ō (天竺逆山不動王).
Reverse the act, reverse it. When reversed, it will bloom like bloody flowers on the other side. Scatter like dust and break apart, Sowa-ka.
Burn away, vanish, wither. Be gone, {{ill|Ikiryō|en|Ikiryō|qid=Q2986373|lt=ikiryō|1=Ikiryō}}, {{ill|inugami|ja|狗神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/inugami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 犬神|1=Inugami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1150212}}, {{ill|sarugami|ja|猿神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sarugami|qq=}}, water officials, long ropes, flying fires, and false flames.
To the chest, the four directions scatter and break apart like dust, Sowa-ka.
The other side will not know. This side shall discern. Let the other side spit blue blood, black blood, red blood, true blood. Let them spew foam.
Immediately scatter into dust. Travel to the seven-tiered realms of Tenjiku. Gather seven stones, build seven graves, erect seven stone towers, and seal them with seven keys. Scatter like dust, return to water. Chant "Om A Vi Ra Un Ken Sowa-ka."
With the blow of the ritual, the reversal spell is performed. Strike and banish to the seven hells.
Om A Vi Ra Un Ken Sowa-ka.
{{translated page|ja|不動王生霊返し|version=52670782|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:不動王生霊返し]]
